$comment: Auto-discovered plugin hooks for eb5-due-diligence. The PreToolUse 'privacy guard' deterministically blocks reading or transmitting the CONTENTS of files inside an EB-5 package's high-sensitivity folders (identity / source-of-funds / path-of-funds / filed immigration forms), enforcing the privacy hard rule of the eb5-prepare and eb5-gapcheck skills at the harness level rather than relying on the model. It is narrowly scoped to those distinctively-named folders, so it does not interfere with unrelated work or with /eb5-vet reading issuer offering documents. See scripts/privacy_guard.ps1.
